title: malva microphylla
intro: Malva microphylla, also known as small mallow or dwarf mallow, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing effects. The health benefits of Malva microphylla include reducing inflammation and pain, treating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems such as coughs and sore throats. Malva microphylla can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications for its skin-soothing and wound-healing properties.
